positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a celestial animal, combining the grace of a winged fox and the form of a soaring phoenix. The design should be rendered in a neo-tribal, geometric linework style, resembling a detailed woodcut etching. The primary colors are deep indigo, electric cyan, and brilliant gold foil accents, set against a dark, midnight blue background. The composition is centered, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and intricate, repeating tribal patterns filling the space. Use high contrast black and colored ink only. The overall aesthetic must be scalable and suitable for screen printing on fabric, with clean edges and crisp lines. Mythological, ornamental, vector illustration, maximalist pattern.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, low contrast, poor detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photographic, realistic, muted colors
